title: Samsung Messages Is Retiring So That Google Messages Can Take Over
description: Samsung says switching to Google Messages will give users access to updates like the latest artificial intelligence features from Google's Gemini.
content:
Samsung is saying goodbye to its namesake texting app.

title: Sam Altman’s OpenAI calls for 4-day workweek, reduced taxes to offset AI-driven job disruption
description: Artificial intelligence is reshaping jobs and income structures, raising concerns about inequality. OpenAI has proposed solutions including a four-day workweek, robot taxes, and a public wealth fund to ensure AI-driven productivity gains are shared more evenly across society and workers.

title: Real neta or digital avatar? Inside the AI-powered campaigning for 2026 assembly polls
description: As campaigning gathers pace across states, parties like BJP and Congress to regional players such as the DMK, AIADMK and Trinamool Congress are deploying artificial intelligence to scale up outreach, customise messaging and dominate digital platforms.
content:

description: Family physician Eric Boose has been using an artificial intelligence tool to get back to what he calls "old-fashioned medicine" — talking with patients face-to-face, without having to type into a computer at the same time.
